title: Implement animal health control programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement animal health control programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess animal health status and treatment options

pcs.text: Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animal health program information from the livestock production plan.

pcs.text: Assess animal health status and identify potential health issues for different groups and classes of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess animal health status and identify potential health issues for different groups and classes of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess animal health status and identify potential health issues for different groups and classes of livestock.

pcs.text: Identify prevention and treatment strategies to resolve health issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify prevention and treatment strategies to resolve health issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify prevention and treatment strategies to resolve health issues.

pcs.text: Source information on parasite immunity to different classes of chemicals and plan for rotation or combination of chemical groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source information on parasite immunity to different classes of chemicals and plan for rotation or combination of chemical groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source information on parasite immunity to different classes of chemicals and plan for rotation or combination of chemical groups.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess animal health status and treatment options

elements.title: Prepare for treatment of animals

pcs.text: Identify animals affected by infection or parasites or requiring treatment or vaccination according to animal health plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animals affected by infection or parasites or requiring treatment or vaccination according to animal health plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animals affected by infection or parasites or requiring treatment or vaccination according to animal health plan.

pcs.text: Determine the severity of infection where applicable through approved testing methods or by seeking expert or veterinary advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the severity of infection where applicable through approved testing methods or by seeking expert or veterinary advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the severity of infection where applicable through approved testing methods or by seeking expert or veterinary advice.

pcs.text: Determine the type and severity of infestation where applicable through faecal egg counts or other tests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the type and severity of infestation where applicable through faecal egg counts or other tests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the type and severity of infestation where applicable through faecal egg counts or other tests.

pcs.text: Determine the need for treatment and the type and scope of treatment and prepare according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need for treatment and the type and scope of treatment and prepare according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need for treatment and the type and scope of treatment and prepare according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice.

pcs.text: Prepare treatment site, and prepare and use equipment and materials according to safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare treatment site, and prepare and use equipment and materials according to safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare treatment site, and prepare and use equipment and materials according to safe working practices.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for treatment of animals

elements.title: Treat animals

pcs.text: Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and restrain animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Administer treatment hygienically and consistently according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer treatment hygienically and consistently according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer treatment hygienically and consistently according to manufacturer specifications or veterinary advice.

pcs.text: Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods (WHP) and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods (WHP) and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record treatment batch numbers, date of expiry, withholding periods (WHP) and other details of treatment according to regulations and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify treated animals to ensure WHP compliance and isolation from non-treated animals where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify treated animals to ensure WHP compliance and isolation from non-treated animals where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify treated animals to ensure WHP compliance and isolation from non-treated animals where required.

pcs.text: Identify the environmental implications associated with the treatment of animals, assess and control appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the environmental implications associated with the treatment of animals, assess and control appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the environmental implications associated with the treatment of animals, assess and control appropriately.

pcs.text: Count animals out, prepare and move along a planned route without damage to person, property or environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Count animals out, prepare and move along a planned route without damage to person, property or environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Count animals out, prepare and move along a planned route without damage to person, property or environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Treat animals

elements.title: Complete treatment process

pcs.text: Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report abnormalities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report abnormalities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor animal health and condition post-treatment and report abnormalities.

pcs.text: Dispose of animal residues and waste according to environmental practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of animal residues and waste according to environmental practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of animal residues and waste according to environmental practices.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain treatment site using appropriate hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain treatment site using appropriate hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain treatment site using appropriate hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store health treatments appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store health treatments appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store health treatments appropriately.

pcs.text: Complete and maintain records and documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and maintain records and documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and maintain records and documentation.

pcs.text: Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete treatment process
